infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: HealthAgent reads your health data to display vitals, activity, sleep, and lab results on your dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: HealthAgent writes health data to keep your records in sync.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HealthAgent uses the camera to capture photos of your health documents for upload.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HealthAgent accesses your photo library so you can upload existing photos of health documents.

plugins.cameraPermission: HealthAgent uses the camera to capture photos of your health documents for upload.

plugins.photosPermission: HealthAgent accesses your photo library so you can upload existing photos of health documents.
